title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.810 - Discovery in certain eviction proceedings
text:
441.810.  Discovery in certain eviction proceedings. — The plaintiff shall provide to all defendants a reasonable opportunity, prior to the hearing, to examine all documents or records that are within the plaintiff's possession and which are relevant to the pending action.  The court may allow further discovery if further discovery would not unduly delay the action and would ensure fair disposition of the action.
(L. 1997 H.B. 361)
